installCommand: if [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then pnpm install --frozen-lockfile; elif [ -f ../../pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then cd ../.. && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile; else pnpm install --frozen-lockfile; fi
buildCommand: if [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then pnpm exec turbo build --filter=hq; else pnpm run build; fi
